rationale: Review 2's finding is correct and confirmed against the diff: the two new imports in TauCeti.lean violate the alphabetical ordering used by the rest of the aggregator (FieldTheory.Trace and NumberTheory.EffectiveBounds already in place show the convention), placing NumberTheory.Multiquadratic before FieldTheory.IntermediateField and before EffectiveBounds. In Lean/Mathlib-style projects maintainers routinely ask for this fix, so acting on Review 2 produces a better PR, while acting on Review 1 leaves the ordering broken.
